title: VLA-JEPA: Enhancing Vision-Language-Action Model with Latent World Model
summary: VLA-JEPA introduces a JEPA-style pretraining framework for vision-language-action policies that avoids pixel-space reconstruction biases by using leakage-free state prediction, where future information serves only as supervision targets and not as inputs. The approach learns dynamics abstractions in latent space and employs a streamlined two-stage training recipe. The method demonstrates improved performance on robotics benchmarks relative to prior VLA approaches.
